nasb.text: If grape gatherers came to you, Would they not leave gleanings? If thieves came by night, They would destroy only until they had enough.

esv.text: If grape gatherers came to you, would they not leave gleanings? If thieves came by night, would they not destroy only enough for themselves?

cnv.text: 收取葡萄的若來到你那裡， 豈不剩下一些葡萄嗎？ 盜賊若在夜間來到你那裡， 豈不是只偷他們所要的嗎？

ccb.text: 人们来以东摘葡萄，不会摘尽； 盗贼夜间来偷东西，不会偷光。
